title: Daniel Operator Agreement & IP Ownership Tracker
summary: Internal tracker for Daniel's operator agreement status, IP/menu/name ownership, lawyer touchpoints, and legal document dependencies.

items.title: Operator Agreement Draft
items.blockedReason: Requires legal counsel review before proceeding
items.summary: Formal operator agreement defining Daniel's role, responsibilities, compensation structure, and termination conditions.
requiredDocuments: Operator Agreement Template (requires lawyer review)
Compensation structure signed by both parties
Non-compete clause (requires lawyer review)
items.nextAction: John to engage lawyer for template review and customization
openQuestions: Profit-sharing percentage vs fixed salary model?
Exit terms - notice period and transfer of operations?
Exclusivity - can Daniel operate other food businesses?

items.title: Background Check
items.summary: Formal background and employment verification for operator role.
requiredDocuments: Background check consent form
Employment history verification
items.nextAction: Select background check provider and obtain Daniel's consent

items.title: Liability Insurance Coverage
items.blockedReason: Requires insurance broker consultation to determine coverage model
items.summary: Determine whether Daniel needs separate liability coverage or is covered under Juke's policy.
requiredDocuments: Operator liability requirements (requires insurance broker consult)
Certificate of Insurance updates if Daniel is added to policy
items.nextAction: John to consult Goosehead Insurance re: operator coverage structure
openQuestions: Is Daniel covered under existing GL policy as an operator?
Who is named insured vs additional insured?

items.title: Juke's Diner Brand Name Rights
items.summary: John retains 100% ownership of 'Juke's Diner' name, logo, branding. Daniel operates under license only.
requiredDocuments: Trademark ownership documentation (if trademark is registered)
Brand licensing clause in operator agreement
items.nextAction: Confirm trademark registration status; include explicit licensing language in operator agreement
items.notes: Daniel must understand he has zero ownership claim to the Juke's name or brand, even if he operates the business day-to-day.

items.title: Menu & Recipe Ownership
items.summary: All menu items, recipes, sourcing relationships, and 'secret sauce' formulas remain 100% John's property.
requiredDocuments: Recipe confidentiality/non-disclosure clause in operator agreement
Trade secret protection clause
items.nextAction: Include explicit menu IP ownership and confidentiality clause in operator agreement
items.notes: Daniel cannot take recipes, supplier contacts, or menu concepts to another business. Consider requiring signed NDA separate from operator agreement.

items.title: Truck & Equipment Ownership
items.summary: Food truck, equipment, POS system, and all physical assets remain John's property. Daniel is custodian only.
requiredDocuments: Asset custody clause in operator agreement
Damage liability and maintenance responsibility clause
items.nextAction: Define damage/loss liability split and required insurance coverage in operator agreement
openQuestions: Who pays for normal wear-and-tear vs negligent damage?
What happens to equipment if Daniel exits?
Is Daniel required to maintain specific insurance on the truck?

items.title: Customer Data & Bookings Ownership
items.summary: All customer contacts, booking history, email lists, and sales data remain 100% Juke's property.
requiredDocuments: Data ownership clause in operator agreement
Non-solicitation clause (prevents Daniel from taking customers if he exits)
items.nextAction: Include explicit data ownership and non-solicitation language in operator agreement
items.notes: Daniel cannot download customer lists or contact Juke's customers for competing businesses after exit.

items.title: Operator Agreement Legal Review
items.summary: Lawyer must review and customize operator agreement template before Daniel signs.
requiredDocuments: Draft operator agreement
List of open questions for lawyer input
items.nextAction: John to schedule consultation with franchise or employment lawyer
items.lawyerType: Employment Law or Small Business Contract Attorney
items.notes: DO NOT CONTACT LAWYER YET - this is flagged for John to initiate when ready.

items.title: IP Protection Legal Review
items.summary: Lawyer review of IP protection clauses (name, menu, recipes, trade secrets).
requiredDocuments: Current trademark status
List of trade secrets to protect (recipes, suppliers, pricing)
Non-compete and non-solicitation language for lawyer review
items.nextAction: John to compile list of IP assets and trade secrets for lawyer consultation
items.lawyerType: Intellectual Property or Small Business Attorney
items.notes: Can be bundled with operator agreement review to save costs. DO NOT CONTACT LAWYER YET.

items.title: Operator Agreement Template
items.blockedReason: Requires lawyer to draft or review template
items.summary: Core legal document defining Daniel's operator relationship with Juke's.
items.nextAction: John to engage lawyer for template creation or review

items.title: Standalone Non-Disclosure Agreement
items.summary: Separate NDA to protect recipes, supplier contacts, and business strategy.
mustInclude: Definition of confidential information (recipes, suppliers, pricing, customer data)
Non-disclosure obligations during and after operator relationship
Return of confidential materials upon exit
items.nextAction: John to decide if standalone NDA is needed in addition to operator agreement confidentiality clause
items.notes: May be redundant if operator agreement has strong confidentiality provisions. Lawyer can advise.

items.title: Insurance Requirements & Coverage Confirmation
items.summary: Document specifying insurance coverage for Daniel as operator (GL, auto, workers comp if applicable).
mustInclude: General liability coverage confirmation (is Daniel covered under Juke's policy?)
Auto insurance for food truck (operator as driver)
Workers compensation requirements (if Daniel is considered employee vs contractor)
items.nextAction: John to consult Goosehead Insurance (contact: Sarah Miller, (555) 019-8877)

items.title: Background Check Consent Form
items.summary: Signed consent for background and employment verification check.
mustInclude: Compliance with Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) if using third-party service
items.nextAction: John to select background check provider and prepare consent form

items.title: Phase 1: Legal Consultation & Document Preparation
tasks: Consult insurance broker re: operator coverage

items.title: Phase 2: Agreement Negotiation & Signatures
tasks: Obtain Daniel's signature on agreement and NDA

items.title: Phase 3: Insurance & Compliance Finalization
tasks: Update insurance policies to include Daniel as operator (if required)
File any required state/local operator registrations
Set up payroll or contractor payment structure

items.title: Phase 4: Operational Handoff & Monitoring
tasks: Hand over truck/equipment custody with signed inventory
Establish reporting cadence (weekly financials, operations updates)
Schedule 30/60/90 day check-ins to assess agreement terms

riskFlags.title: No Written Operator Agreement in Place
riskFlags.description: Operating without a signed agreement exposes John to IP theft, liability claims, and unclear exit terms.
riskFlags.mitigation: Prioritize Phase 1 legal consultation and agreement drafting immediately.

riskFlags.title: Unclear Insurance Coverage for Operator
riskFlags.description: If Daniel causes an accident or injury while operating the truck, unclear insurance coverage could leave John personally liable.
riskFlags.mitigation: Consult insurance broker ASAP to confirm coverage and obtain certificates.

riskFlags.title: Recipes & Menu IP Vulnerable to Theft
riskFlags.description: Without signed NDA and IP ownership clauses, Daniel could take recipes, supplier contacts, and menu concepts to a competing business.
riskFlags.mitigation: Include strong IP protection, confidentiality, and non-compete clauses in operator agreement. Consider standalone NDA.

riskFlags.title: Customer Data Could Be Taken on Exit
riskFlags.description: If Daniel exits without non-solicitation clause, he could download customer lists and contact Juke's customers for competing business.
riskFlags.mitigation: Include explicit data ownership and non-solicitation clause in operator agreement. Limit Daniel's access to raw customer data.
